title: <div>- Research Design and Execution: Plan and conduct academic research using a
content:
- Research Design and Execution: Plan and conduct academic research using appropriate methodologies.
- Source Evaluation: Apply criteria to evaluate the reliability and relevance of sources.

Learning Outcome 5: Ethical Academic Practice
- Cite Sources: Accurately cite sources to give proper credit and avoid plagiarism.
- Understand Academic Integrity: Understand and apply principles of academic integrity in all coursework, especially in the use of information and ideas.

Learning Outcome 6: Writing and Revising Academic Papers
- Drafting: Produce detailed drafts that effectively communicate the purpose of the research and the arguments developed.
- Revising: Refine drafts through substantial revisions focusing on argument clarity, organizational structure, and style.

Learning Outcome 7: Application of Digital Tools
- Technological Proficiency: Utilize digital tools for research, writing, and presentation to enhance the quality and presentation of academic work.
- Digital Communication: Effectively communicate research findings through digital platforms and formats, adapting to the conventions of digital media.
